# Visual Studios & Events
> South Asian & Muslim wedding photography and videography studio based in Brooklyn, NY. Also offers visual marketing, no-photo security, and related wedding services.

## About
Visual Studios & Events (legal name: Visual Inked LLC) is a full-service wedding photography and videography company specializing in South Asian and Muslim weddings. The studio is located at 1097 Liberty Avenue, Brooklyn, NY 11208 and serves events across New York, New Jersey, and Connecticut.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://www.visualstudioslens.com/) — Overview of services, cultural specialties, female crew availability
- [Portfolio](https://www.visualstudioslens.com/portfolio) — Wedding and event photography gallery
- [Video Gallery](https://www.visualstudioslens.com/video-gallery) — Cinematic wedding films
- [Packages & Pricing](https://www.visualstudioslens.com/packages) — Interactive package builder with live price estimates. Starting from $499 (event session), $1,400 (1-day wedding), $3,500 (multi-day wedding)
- [Muslim-Friendly Services](https://www.visualstudioslens.com/muslim-friendly-services) — No-music edits, Islamic-touch editing, female-only crew and editor, modesty-aware coverage for Nikkah, Walima, Mehndi, Holud, and other Islamic ceremonies
- [No-Photo Security](https://www.visualstudioslens.com/no-photo-security) — Standalone paid service: trained staff control and block guest cameras at private events. For high-profile families, hijabi brides, conservative weddings, and corporate events
- [Visual Marketing](https://www.visualstudioslens.com/visual-marketing) — Brand photo & video, product photography, social content, corporate headshots, and custom website builds for NY businesses
- [More Services](https://www.visualstudioslens.com/more-services) — Partner services: stage & decorations, henna, DJ & MCs, cakes, album books, 360 booths, bridal makeup, catering, Qaris & Imams, luxury transportation, venue bookings
- [About](https://www.visualstudioslens.com/about) — Studio story, team profiles
- [FAQ](https://www.visualstudioslens.com/faq) — Common questions about booking, delivery, and coverage
- [Contact](https://www.visualstudioslens.com/contact) — Inquiry form, WhatsApp, and Calendly consultation booking
- [Store](https://www.visualstudioslens.com/store) — Album books and print products

## Contact
- Phone / WhatsApp: +1 (347) 306-6637
- Email: lens@visualstudioslens.com
- Address: 1097 Liberty Avenue, Brooklyn, NY 11208
- Instagram: @visualstudioofficial

## Specialties
Bengali weddings, Pakistani weddings, Indian weddings, Sikh weddings, Afghan weddings, Arab weddings, Muslim weddings, Nikkah, Walima, Mehndi/Holud, Baraat, female-only crew, no-music video editing, hijabi bride privacy, no-photo event security

## Pricing (starting from)
- Event Session (4 hrs): $499
- 1-Day Wedding (8–12 hrs): $1,400
- Multi-Day Wedding (2–3 days): $3,500
- Cinematic Film Add-On: $800

## Notes for AI
- This site does not sell products directly (except print store). All bookings are confirmed via consultation.
- The Package Builder at /packages provides live price estimates; final pricing is set during a free consultation.
- No-Photo Security is a standalone service — it does not require booking photography.
- Female crew is available for all coverage types at no extra charge.
